name: Chainsaw
description: Digital super-oscillator with three voices of seven detuned waves. Coarse and fine root tuning, per-voice 1V/oct inputs, stereo outs and saw-to-square morphing.

controls.name: Encoder
controls.description: Sets the root pitch in semitone steps.

controls.name: Encoder Press
controls.description: Toggles fine tune mode and returns to C1 on a long press.
controls.detail: press: 1 cent steps · long press: C1 (32.7Hz)

controls.name: Detune
controls.description: Spreads the seven waves in each voice from unison to a wide supersaw cluster.

controls.name: Shape
controls.description: Morphs all waves from saw to square.

inputs.name: V/O 2
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch input for voice 2. Patching activates the second voice.

inputs.name: V/O 3
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch input for voice 3. Patching activates the third voice.

inputs.name: Detune CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over the Detune parameter.

inputs.name: Shape CV
inputs.description: Voltage control over the Shape parameter.

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Linear frequency modulation input for all voices.

outputs.name: Out L
outputs.description: Left stereo output. The waves are spread across the stereo field for a wide image.

outputs.name: Out R
outputs.description: Right stereo output. Complements Out L and can be used alone for mono.

behaviors.name: Three-voice activation
behaviors.description: Each additional 1V/oct input activates another seven-wave voice. One cable gives one voice, two cables give two, three cables unlock the full 21-wave structure.

behaviors.name: Supersaw to supersquare morph
behaviors.description: Shape morphs every wave from saw to square across the entire oscillator bank. The module stays harmonically dense even at intermediate settings.

behaviors.name: Detuned stereo swarm
behaviors.description: Detune separates the seven waves in each voice along a fixed curve so the stereo pair becomes a wide supersaw stack instead of a static unison.

behaviors.name: Root pitch memory
behaviors.description: The oscillator remembers the previous tuning after power-up, and the encoder long press returns the root to C1.

behaviors.name: Linear FM coloration
behaviors.description: The FM input pushes all voices at once. The manual notes that it responds predictably to waveforms up to 2kHz, which makes it suitable for bright digital sidebands.

patchIdeas.name: Classic stereo lead
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer pitch to V/O 1 · Shape near saw · Detune around 2 o'clock · Out L/R into stereo delay and reverb · one cable already yields a wide three-voice swarm.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Chainsaw:
* Shape: near saw
* Detune: 2 o'clock

Sequencer:
FX Stereo:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 1)
- Chainsaw (Out L) -> FX Stereo (In L)
- Chainsaw (Out R) -> FX Stereo (In R)
- FX Stereo (Out L) -> Output (L)
- FX Stereo (Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Three-voice chord stack
patchIdeas.patch: Separate chord tones to V/O 1-3 · keep Detune modest · Shape halfway for a thick but not buzzy chord bed · stereo outs preserve the intervoice spread.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Chainsaw:
* Detune: noon
* Shape: noon

Chord Source 1:
Chord Source 2:
Chord Source 3:
Mixer:

- Chord Source 1 (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 1)
- Chord Source 2 (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 2)
- Chord Source 3 (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 3)
- Chainsaw (Out L) -> Mixer (In L)
- Chainsaw (Out R) -> Mixer (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate FM bite
patchIdeas.patch: Fast LFO or audio VCO into FM · Shape set brighter · Detune moderate · FM adds edge without destroying the three-voice stack.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Chainsaw:
* Shape: 2 o'clock
* Detune: noon

VCO Mod:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 1)
- VCO Mod (Out) >> Chainsaw (FM)
- Chainsaw (Out L) -> Output (L)
- Chainsaw (Out R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Mono bass through a filter
patchIdeas.patch: Use V/O 1 only · Detune minimum · Shape toward square · take Out L into a filter and VCA chain for a mono bass that still feels wider than a single saw.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Chainsaw:
* Detune: fully CCW
* Shape: 3 o'clock

Sequencer:
Filter:
VCA:
Envelope:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Chainsaw (V/O 1)
- Chainsaw (Out L) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
